title: MyUncle: a bistable order-repair engine for evolutionary cancer-therapy modelling

creators.name: Sandler, Leon
creators.affiliation: Independent Researcher, Northbrook, Illinois, United States

description:
Overview. MyUncle couples an evolutionary sensitive/resistant tumour model to a bistable order-repair variable representing multicellular information integrity, formalising the atavism (cancer-first) hypothesis and comparing six therapy protocols across a virtual mouse cohort.

Key features. tissue_atavism preset; six built-in protocols (MTD, immunotherapy, adaptive dosing, SIM-block, re-differentiation, and combinations); Latin-hypercube global sensitivity analysis; correlation-robust phylostratigraphy pipeline; one-call reproduce_paper().

Repository contents. MyUncle.py (framework), tests/, paper.md/paper.bib, README, LICENSE.

Companion manuscript. 'Cancer as a bistable order-repair transition' (submitted to Bulletin of Mathematical Biology).
notes: This work received no external funding.
